results.text:
Market reset in Web3 hiring

Recent layoffs across Algorand, Gemini, OP Labs, Messari
 ~450 roles cut in a short period
 Open positions down ~80% YoY
The shift is visible.

A year ago, I had multiple offers and inbound opportunities.

Today, I’m actively looking and the market is significantly more selective.
• teams are optimizing for efficiency and smaller, high-impact squads
• hiring now relies heavily on referrals, breaking in without Tier-1 connections is harder
• selection processes are lo
